gp3bayes 0.1.0

Create a Structured Duration Model Report

Source: R/duration-posterior-validation.R
create_duration_model_report.Rd

Writes a conservative Markdown report for an approved fitted lognormal duration model.

Usage

create_duration_model_report(
  fit,
  diagnostics = NULL,
  posterior_summary = NULL,
  posterior_predictive = NULL,
  prior_sensitivity = NULL,
  recovery = NULL,
  file = "gp3bayes-duration-model-report.md",
  overwrite = FALSE
)

Arguments

fit

A gp3bayes_duration_fit.

diagnostics

Optional result from diagnose_duration_fit().

posterior_summary

Optional result from summarise_duration_posterior().

posterior_predictive

Optional result from check_duration_posterior_predictive().

prior_sensitivity

Optional result from assess_duration_prior_sensitivity().

recovery

Optional result from run_duration_recovery().

file

Output Markdown path.

overwrite

Whether an existing file may be replaced.

Value

A gp3bayes_duration_model_report.

On this page
